svg.title: AladdinAI memory architecture
svg.desc: Three-layer memory system with gate control, showing how messages flow through NemoGuard into agent memory, shared memory, and gates log stored in MongoDB Atlas with vector search.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does AladdinAI handle incoming messages?')
sendPrompt('How does the NemoGuard memory gate work in AladdinAI?')
sendPrompt('What is agent memory in AladdinAI?')
sendPrompt('What is shared memory in AladdinAI?')
sendPrompt('What is the gates log in AladdinAI?')
sendPrompt('How does MongoDB Atlas vector search work in AladdinAI?')
g.text: Vector search — finds by meaning, not keyword
